name: CompanyNumber.Danish

unions.name: CompanyNumber
unions.comment: An opaque type representing a valid personal number.

unions.name: ValidationError
unions.comment: If the parsing fails an error of this type is returned.

values.name: decoder
values.comment: Decode a company number.

values.name: display
values.comment: Format a company number into a user readable string (XXXXXXXX).

values.name: encode
values.comment: Encode a company number into a JSON value.

values.name: fromString
values.comment: Parse a string into a company number.

values.name: toString
values.comment:
Converts a company number to string representation in the long format that is
commonly used for database storage (XXXXXXXX).

name: PersonalNumber.Danish

unions.name: PersonalNumber
unions.comment: An opaque type representing a valid personal number.

unions.name: ValidationError
unions.comment: If the parsing fails an error of this type is returned.

values.name: decoder
values.comment: Decode a personal number.

values.name: display
values.comment: Format a personal number into a user readable string (DDMMYYXXXX/DDMMYY-XXXX).

values.name: encode
values.comment: Encode a personal number into a JSON value.

values.name: fromString
values.comment: Parse a string into a personal number.

values.name: isFemale
values.comment: Females have an even serial number

values.name: isMale
values.comment: Males have an odd serial number

values.name: toString
values.comment:
Converts a personal number to string representation in the long format that is
commonly used for database storage (DDMMYYXXXX/DDMMYY-XXXX).

name: PersonalNumber.Finnish

unions.name: PersonalNumber
unions.comment: An opaque type representing a valid personal number.

unions.name: ValidationError
unions.comment: If the parsing fails an error of this type is returned.

values.name: decoder
values.comment: Decode a personal number.

values.name: display
values.comment: Format a personal number into a user readable string (DDMMYY-ZZZQ).

values.name: encode
values.comment: Encode a personal number into a JSON value.

values.name: fromString
values.comment: Parse a string into a personal number.

values.name: isFemale
values.comment: Females have an even serial number

values.name: isMale
values.comment: Males have an odd serial number

values.name: toString
values.comment:
Converts a personal number to string representation in the long format that is
commonly used for database storage (DDMMYYCZZZQ).

name: PersonalNumber.Norwegian

unions.name: PersonalNumber
unions.comment: An opaque type representing a valid personal number.

unions.name: ValidationError
unions.comment: If the parsing fails an error of this type is returned.

values.name: decoder
values.comment: Decode a personal number.

values.name: display
values.comment: Format a personal number into a user readable string (DDMMYY-XXX-CC).

values.name: encode
values.comment: Encode a personal number into a JSON value.

name: PersonalNumber.Swedish

unions.name: PersonalNumber
unions.comment: An opaque type representing a valid personal number.

unions.name: ValidationError
unions.comment: If the parsing fails an error of this type is returned.

values.name: decoder
values.comment: Decode a personal number.

values.name: display
values.comment: Format a personal number into a user readable string (YYYYMMDD-XXXX).

values.name: encode
values.comment: Encode a personal number into a JSON value.

values.name: fromString
values.comment: Parse a string into a personal number.

values.name: isPNR
values.comment: Check if the personal number is a "personnummer".

values.name: isSAM
values.comment: Check if the personal number is a "sammordningsnummer".

values.name: toString
values.comment: Converts a personal number to string representation in the long format that is commonly used for database storage (YYYYMMDDXXXX).
